name: sota-evolution-loop
description: Autonomous SOTA evolution loop for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: sota-evolution-loop
plugins.description: Autonomous loop that evolves ALL features toward evidence-based SOTA thresholds. 7-phase pipeline (research, probe, analyze, plan, evolve, verify, report) with TDD, real system testing via OAuth, quality gates, keep/discard pattern, and loop-back for iterative improvement.
